submission_acceptance.summary: Queue-only, fast-path, and split-case submissions all exercised the canonical Discovery submission path.

overview_acceptance.summary: Overview reader consumed the canonical queue document and returned status counts plus recent entries.

signal_acceptance.summary: Signal adapter accepted degraded signals through canonical Discovery submission and ignored healthy runtime state.

front_door_acceptance.summary: Engine-backed front-door submission routed to the expected lane and created routing plus engine run artifacts.

engine_contract_surface.summary: Public Engine exports remained callable and preserved mission-specificity, deduplication, and correction-ledger behavior.

notes: Directive Workspace remains the product; the host is only accepted as a consumer of the canonical surface.
Passing acceptance does not authorize host-local redefinition of Discovery, Runtime, or Architecture vocabulary.
Engine contract surface checks validate that critical engine exports remain accessible and correctly shaped.
